steps.title: Culture FreeStyle™ HEK293F cells at 37...
steps.instruction: Culture FreeStyle™ HEK293F cells at 37 °C in FreeStyle™ 293 Expression Medium.

steps.title: The day before transfection, seed cells...
steps.instruction: The day before transfection, seed cells at a density of 0.7 × 10⁶ cells/mL.

steps.title: On the day of transfection, 400...
steps.instruction: On the day of transfection, 400 µg of endotoxin-free plasmid DNA encoding 3XFLAG-TEV-ATG2A or its variants was diluted in 13 mL Opti-MEM™ medium

steps.title: In parallel, 800 µg PEI 25K...
steps.instruction: In parallel, 800 µg PEI 25K was also diluted in 13 mL Opti-MEM™.

steps.title: Combine DNA and PEI mixtures and...
steps.instruction: Combine DNA and PEI mixtures and incubate for 00:15:00 at Room temperature , then add dropwise to a 400 mL culture of HEK293F cells.

steps.title: 24 h post-transfection, culture the supplement...
steps.instruction: 24 h post-transfection, culture the supplement with 100 mL EX-CELL® 293 Serum-Free Medium.

steps.title: 72 h later, harvest cells by...
steps.instruction: 72 h later, harvest cells by centrifugation at 270 x g, °C, for 00:20:00 .

steps.title: Wash Pellets once with PBS, flash-frozen...
steps.instruction: Wash Pellets once with PBS, flash-frozen in liquid nitrogen, and store at -80 °C .

steps.title: Thaw Frozen pellets On ice and...
steps.instruction: Thaw Frozen pellets On ice and resuspend in 20 mL lysis buffer.

steps.title: Resuspension is performed by gentle pipetting,...
steps.instruction: Resuspension is performed by gentle pipetting, followed by mechanical lysis using a Dounce homogenizer: 10 strokes with loose pestle 2 × 20 strokes with tight pestle

steps.title: Incubate Lysates for 20-30 min On ice
steps.instruction: Incubate Lysates for 20-30 min On ice .

steps.title: Clarify lysates by centrifugation at 15000...
steps.instruction: Clarify lysates by centrifugation at 15000 rpm, °C, for 00:30:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Collect the supernatant and proceed to purification
steps.instruction: Collect the supernatant and proceed to purification.

steps.title: Incubate cleared lysates with 0
steps.instruction: Incubate cleared lysates with 0.6 mL pre-equilibrated anti-FLAG® M2 resin for 03:00:00 at 4 °C with gentle rotation.

steps.title: Wash beads three times with 13...
steps.instruction: Wash beads three times with 13 mL wash buffer containing glycerol.

steps.title: Wash beads three more times with...
steps.instruction: Wash beads three more times with 13 mL wash buffer without glycerol.

steps.title: Wash beads once with 150 µL...
steps.instruction: Wash beads once with 150 µL of wash buffer without glycerol to recover residual protein (Elution 2).

steps.title: Transfer washed beads to 1
steps.instruction: Transfer washed beads to 1.5 mL tubes.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of wash buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of wash buffer without glycerol containing 5 µL TEV protease per tube. Alternatively, the protein can be eluted using 100 µL of FLAG peptide FLAG Peptide Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #F3290-4MG at a concentration of 4 mg/mL .

steps.title: Incubate overnight at 4 °C with gentle agitation
steps.instruction: Incubate overnight at 4 °C with gentle agitation.

steps.title: Collect eluate (Elution 1)
steps.instruction: Collect eluate (Elution 1).

steps.title: Aliquot Elution 1 and Elution 2,...
steps.instruction: Aliquot Elution 1 and Elution 2, snap-freeze in liquid nitrogen, and store at Temperature -80 °C. All steps were performed at 4 °C or On ice to maintain protein stability. OG was used from a 10% stock in water (CMC ≈ 0.6%) to aid solubilization of membrane- associated ATG2A.
